text: I really wish there was a bulk export to CSV feature
Bulk data export would save us hours every week
Can you add a CSV export button to the reports page?
We need SSO / SAML support. Our IT department won't approve without it.
Single sign-on with Okta would be a dealbreaker if you don't have it
Mobile app for iOS would be great for reviewing dashboards on the go
Can you add keyboard shortcuts? I use this tool every day
